creator: bcook@poklib.org
text:
Received:
from hub.freebsd.org (hub.freebsd.org [216.136.204.18]) by mx2.freebsd.org (Postfix) with ESMTP id 27BD27351D; Thu, 13 Jul 2006 20:29:13 +0000 (GMT) (envelope-from bcook@poklib.org)
Received:
by hub.freebsd.org (Postfix) id 2468016A4E2; Thu, 13 Jul 2006 20:29:13 +0000 (UTC)
Delivered-To:
delphij@freebsd.org
Received:
from mx1.FreeBSD.org (mx1.freebsd.org [216.136.204.125]) by hub.freebsd.org (Postfix) with ESMTP id 2309F16A4E1 for <delphij@freebsd.org>; Thu, 13 Jul 2006 20:29:13 +0000 (UTC) (envelope-from bcook@poklib.org)
Received:
from c.mx.poklib.org (c.mx.poklib.org [64.72.87.254]) by mx1.FreeBSD.org (Postfix) with ESMTP id A80EB43D8C for <delphij@freebsd.org>; Thu, 13 Jul 2006 20:29:02 +0000 (GMT) (envelope-from bcook@poklib.org)
Received:
from [192.168.1.249] (helo=mail.poklib.org) by c.mx.poklib.org with esmtps (TLSv1:AES256-SHA:256) (Exim 4.62; FreeBSD) (envelope-from <bcook@poklib.org>) id 1G17nv-000AE2-Hk for delphij@freebsd.org ; Thu, 13 Jul 2006 16:28:59 -0400

Final-Recipient: rfc822; delphij@delphij.net
Action: failed
Status: 5.0.0
Diagnostic-Code: X-Postfix; host tarsier.geekcn.org[210.51.165.229] said: 550
    5.7.1 Rejected due to SPF policy for sender bcook@poklib.org (in reply to
    end of DATA command)

Fix: 

If mx1 is going to relay to mx2, mx2 should not be doing SPF checks.
How-To-Repeat: Send an email to someone at freebsd.org and have valid strict SPF in your sending domain.
